name: Catfish in Beer
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown finely-chopped garlic and onions in butter over sizzling heat.
2. Add flour to the pan and coat the catfish fillets evenly.
3. Add mushrooms to the pan and cook until browned on both sides.
4. Pour in beer and lemon juice, then add Worcestershire sauce.
5. Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until the catfish is cooked through.
6. Serve hot on plates with rice, using the pan gravy over the rice.
